gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用错位的语音留言，编织一段跨越距离的浪漫奇迹。
gems.whyWatchEn: A mistaken voicemail sparks an unlikely long-distance romance, blending humor and heartfelt emotion in a fresh, modern love story.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松治愈、带点巧合与惊喜的浪漫爱情片的观众
gems.audienceEn: Audiences who enjoy lighthearted, heartwarming romantic comedies with serendipitous twists.
